title: setaria jaffrei
intro: Setaria jaffrei, also known as the 'Cotton Wool Grass', is a type of plant species in the grass family, native to the islands of Réunion and Mauritius. The medicinal properties of Setaria jaffrei include its ability to treat fever, cough, and bronchitis due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and provide relief from fever. In traditional medicine, Setaria jaffrei is prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
